title: Contact Water Survey of Canada - Canada.ca
content:
## Contact Water Survey of Canada
This is your primary contact point if you have questions regarding Environment Canada’s surface water information and services. The Water Survey of Canada is committed to the timely response of your questions.
As Canada’s main source of hydrological information, we welcome your questions and value your feedback.
Contact the Water Survey of Canada directly.

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
